heading: Definitions
label: 9201 Definitions
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–260, div. P, § 1134 Stat. 2159Dec. 27, 2020“This division [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘National Bio and Agro-Defense Facility Act of 2020’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–260, div. P, § 1134 Stat. 2159Dec. 27, 2020“This division [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘National Bio and Agro-Defense Facility Act of 2020’.”

children.heading: Animal
children.label: 1 Animal
children.text: The term “animal” has the meaning given the term in .section 8302 of this title

children.heading: Transboundary disease
children.label: 2 Transboundary disease
children.text: The term “transboundary disease” has the meaning given the term in .section 8914(a) of this title

children.heading: Veterinary countermeasure
children.label: 3 Veterinary countermeasure
children.text: The term “veterinary countermeasure” has the meaning given the term in .section 8302 of this title
